_comment: arXiv fetch queries for scripts/17_survey_corpus.py --fetch-arxiv. Hand-tuned to maximise recall of LLM-as-Judge papers without runaway false positives. Categories restrict to ML / NLP / AI.

queries.arxiv_query: abs:"LLM-as-a-judge" OR abs:"LLM as a judge" OR abs:"language model judge"
(abs:"evaluator LLM" OR abs:"automatic evaluator" OR abs:"judge model") AND (abs:"large language model" OR abs:"LLM")
queries.rationale: Catches papers that don't use 'judge' nomenclature.

queries.arxiv_query: abs:"reward model" AND (abs:"RLHF" OR abs:"preference") AND abs:"evaluation"
queries.rationale: Reward models are a special case of judges; include for completeness.

queries.arxiv_query: (abs:"position bias" OR abs:"self-preference" OR abs:"prompt injection") AND (abs:"judge" OR abs:"evaluator" OR abs:"LLM")
queries.rationale: Failure-mode subliterature; central to §4 of the survey.

queries.arxiv_query: (abs:"mitigat" OR abs:"calibration" OR abs:"ensemble" OR abs:"consensus") AND (abs:"LLM judge" OR abs:"evaluator" OR abs:"reward model")
(abs:"LLM evaluation" OR abs:"large language model evaluation") AND (abs:"benchmark" OR abs:"metric" OR abs:"scoring")
queries.rationale: Broader context; partial-relevance papers for citation completeness.
